chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-305 of 2026 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Misc. No.1494/2026. 2. For orders on Office Objection No.2 to 3. 3. For orders on Misc. No.1495/2026. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.01.2026. Ms. Asia Ismail, Advocate for the Petitioner. ----- The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, impugning the Order dated 24.12.2025 made by the Foreign Exchange Regulation Appellate Board, at Karachi dismissing the Appeal filed against the underlying Order dated 20.01.2025. A perusal of the impugned Order reflects that the Appeal was dismissed as being time-barred. The only ground raised by the Petitioner is that he was unaware of the date of the Order. However, a perusal thereof reflects the presence of the Counsel, hence the Petition is found to be misconceived, and, while granting the application for urgency, we accordingly dismiss the same in limine, along with the other Miscellaneous Applications. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
